across.clue: A feeling that something is true or will happen although you do not know any definite facts about it.

Plan or propose a law | Intend a ___
involved in an important way in making something happen.
Someone who uses force to take and keep power in a country
to legally force someone to leave the house they are living in usually because they have not paid their rent.

down.clue: the saying of something in a way that is not loud or clear enough so that your words are difficult to understand.

a child or other relative to whom you give food money and a home

existing or available in large quantities.

a law or set of laws
